parameters.jsCode:
const raw = $input.item.json.body || $input.item.json;
return [{ json: {
  job_id: raw.job_id || 'JOB-' + Date.now(),
  job_site: raw.job_site || '',
  job_type: raw.job_type || 'unknown',
  client: raw.client || '',
  foreman: raw.foreman || '',
  contract_value: raw.contract_value || '',
  start_date: raw.start_date || new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0],
  target_end_date: raw.target_end_date || '',
  permit_status: raw.permit_status || 'Pending',
  compliance_tags: raw.compliance_tags || [],
  reporting_cadence: raw.reporting_cadence || 'weekly',
  client_email: raw.client_email || '',
  created_at: new Date().toISOString()
}}];

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({ "model": "claude-sonnet-4-20250514", "max_tokens": 600, "messages": [{ "role": "user", "content": "Classify this construction foreman update. Return ONLY valid JSON.

JOB SITE: " + $('Parse Foreman Update').item.json.job_site + "
FOREMAN NOTE: " + ($('Parse Foreman Update').item.json.foreman_note || 'No note') + "
BLOCKERS: " + ($('Parse Foreman Update').item.json.blockers || 'None') + "

Job types: hospital | school | tenant_improvement | flood_restoration | maintenance | commercial

Return: {"job_type":"","status":"on_track|at_risk|blocked","compliance_flags":[],"permit_alert":"yes|no","stalled_detection":"yes|no","foreman_summary":"","client_summary":"","next_milestone":"","risk_factors":[],"report_cadence_override":"inherit|daily|weekly|bi-weekly|monthly|per_milestone"}" }]) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ "model": "claude-sonnet-4-20250514", "max_tokens": 500, "messages": [{ "role": "user", "content": "Classify this new construction job. Return ONLY valid JSON.

SITE: " + $('Parse New Job Data').item.json.job_site + "
CLIENT: " + ($('Parse New Job Data').item.json.client || '') + "
DESC: " + ($('Parse New Job Data').item.json.foreman_note || 'New project') + "

Return: {"job_type":"","compliance_tags":[],"permit_required":[],"reporting_cadence":"","vincent_alert":"yes|no"}" }]) }}

parameters.jsCode:
const ai = (() => { try { const r=$('AI Classify New Job').item.json; const c=(r.content&&r.content[0])?r.content[0].text:''; const m=c.match(/\{[\s\S]*\}/); return JSON.parse(m?m[0]:c); } catch(e){ return null; } })();
const i = $('Parse New Job Data').item.json;
return [{ json: {
  job_id: i.job_id, job_site: i.job_site,
  job_type: ai ? ai.job_type : i.job_type,
  client: i.client, foreman: i.foreman,
  contract_value: i.contract_value,
  start_date: i.start_date, target_end_date: i.target_end_date,
  permit_status: i.permit_status,
  permits_required: (ai && ai.permit_required) ? ai.permit_required : (i.permits_required || []),
  compliance_tags: (ai && ai.compliance_tags) ? ai.compliance_tags : (i.compliance_tags || []),
  reporting_cadence: ai ? ai.reporting_cadence : (i.reporting_cadence || 'weekly'),
  client_email: i.client_email,
  vincent_alert: ai ? ai.vincent_alert : 'no',
  status: 'on_track', percent_complete: 0,
  created_at: i.created_at
}}];

const d = $('Build Canonical Record').item.json;
return [{ json: {
  'Date': d.update_date, 'Job ID': d.job_id, 'Job Site': d.job_site,
  'Job Type': d.job_type, 'Foreman': d.foreman_name,
  'Percent Complete': String(d.percent_complete),
  'Status': d.status.toUpperCase(), 'Status Emoji': d.status_emoji,
  'Foreman Summary': (d.foreman_summary||'').substring(0,300),
  'Client Summary': (d.client_summary||'').substring(0,300),
  'Blockers': d.blockers || 'None',
  'Compliance Flags': (d.compliance_flags||[]).join(', '),
  'Permit Alert': d.permit_alert, 'Stalled': d.stalled_detection,
  'Next Milestone': (d.next_milestone||'').substring(0,200),
  'Client Notified': 'Yes', 'Owner Alert': d.owner_alert_needed ? 'Yes' : 'No',
  'Photo URL': d.photo_url || ''
}}];

parameters.subject: ={{ 'New ' + $('Build New Job Record').item.json.job_type.replace('_',' ') + ' job: ' + $('Build New Job Record').item.json.job_site }}
parameters.message:
={{ '

New Job

ID: ' + $('Build New Job Record').item.json.job_id + '

Site: ' + $('Build New Job Record').item.json.job_site + '

Type: ' + $('Build New Job Record').item.json.job_type + '

Compliance: ' + ($('Build New Job Record').item.json.compliance_tags||[]).join(', ') + '

' }}

parameters.jsCode:
const e = $input.item.json;
return [{ json: { error: true, error_message: e.message||'Unknown', workflow: 'Construction Dashboard Template', timestamp: new Date().toISOString() }}];
